falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,650 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern is invalidated because that bottom formation never saw a 12%+ rally back to prior highs within 2 weeks; this would signal a V-bottom not a sustained bottoming process

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 implies elevated volatility/uncertainty; sustained VIX compression below 14 would prove the stress condition has resolved too quickly, invalidating the bottoming pattern which requires volatility persistence

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 2+ days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern occurred during a rates-driven repricing where yields stabilized/rise; a flight-to-quality bid this aggressive would indicate systemic fear exceeding the pattern's parameters, proving this is a different regime

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
